author: doll-agent
content:
Done. MaskedArray::sort flattened the array to 1-D, making axis-aware sort impossible. Added sort_axis(axis) returning MaskedArray<T, IxDyn> with input shape preserved - each lane along axis sorts independently, masked entries trail the unmasked ascending values within each lane.

Existing sort() unchanged for backward compat.

Note: numpy.ma.compressed also always returns 1-D (documented behavior), so no axis parameter added there.

3 tests added. ferray-ma: 193 -> 196 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 0ef53e03.
